narrative:
Twinsburg 2-B (precinct in Summit County) has 960 registered voters, with 55.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.4%, a clear Democratic lean of 6.4 percentage points.
